name: cogitave-estate
description: READ / discovery + query surface for the Cogitave estate. Tiered onboarding, the property-graph knowledge map, hybrid docs/graph search, and ownership routing over the cogitave-core MCP server (Cogitave Core). Read-only and least-privilege by construction: it never proposes, writes, or mutates. Invoke for any question about what exists in the estate, how it is structured, where a doc/standard/ADR/agent lives, or who owns it.
